entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for resistance improvement.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for resistance improvement.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect that attacks pigeonpea and chickpea.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand attack by Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild species related to pigeonpea and chickpea that serve as sources of resistance genes.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A breeding technique used to transfer genes between different species.

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic material that confers resistance to pests.

entities.name: COMPATIBLE GENE POOL
entities.description: A group of related species that can be successfully hybridized.
